race.comment: KAZOTSKY (7) missed the placings first up recently but was not too far from the winner when sixth over 1000m at Wangaratta. That was in 62 grade and won in 52 company at the final start of last prep. Has the added advantage of gate 1. I'M AIRBORNE (5) finished 4.5 lengths adrift in sixth last time at Albury in a disappointing performance. This more suitable though, so beautifully placed and is sure to be there at the finish. FIRST DIVISION (11) has been racing more consistently than most rivals and hasn't been beaten far in all runs this prep, so no reason he doesn't give this a shake. BARN ZEE (6) is racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid second at Narrandera over 1200m.
